title: Quest 35270 Slow Cooker / 3.5 Litres/Compact Stainless Steel / 200W / 3 Temperature Settings/Transparent Toughened Glass Lid/Dishwasher Safe
features: COMPACT SLOW COOKER – This 3.5 litre stainless-steel slow cooker provides hassle free cooking options, and allows you to produce delicious homemade meals for solo diners or small families.

REMOVABLE POT & GLASS LID – The ceramic pot can be removed from the main body of the slow cooker, allowing you to take it to the table ready for serving, and is also dishwasher safe. The slow cooker also features a transparent glass lid that allows you to keep an eye on the food whilst it is cooking.

3 TEMPERATURE SETTINGS – This compact slow cooker features 3 temperature settings that all offer a separate cooking experience. High will cook the food for 6-8 hours, Low will cook the food for 2-4 hours, and Keep Warm will simply keep the food hot until you’re ready to eat it.
CREATE DELICIOUS MEALS – This slow cooker is perfect for making curries, stews, casseroles, soups, pot roasts, and even delicious desserts like crumbles, brownies and cobblers.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Perfect for 2-4 People Quest 3.5 Litre Slow Cooker Cook delicious meals while saving energy using this 3.5L Slow Cooker from Quest. Its capacity makes it ideal for hosting small groups of family or friends, and it only requires 200W of power. Food can be cooked for up to 8 hours on the high setting, and you can also set the appliance to just keep its contents warm, allowing you to enjoy fresh food later on. Previous page Safe & Stable The machine's cool touch handles help to ensure safe use, and its non-slip feet keep it in place. 3 Temperature Settings Choose between a low power cooking setting, a high power cooking setting, and a keep warm setting. Removable Inner Pot The inner pot can be easily and safely removed, making it easy to serve freshly cooked food. Toughened Glass Lid The transparent lid, made from toughened glass, allows you to safely view the food while cooking. Dishwasher Safe Bowls The bowl can be easily cleaned in a dishwasher after being removed from the cooker, saving you time.
